resources.string: Play videos when you hover over the video thumbnail
Remind Me to Take a Break
Always show webpage title in toolbar

Download manager will launch when a download started
Download manager will launch when a download finished
Include a DNT header when you load a webpage
Load webpage in HTML viewport or wideviewport
Allow webpage to use Database Storage APIs
Allow webpage to use DOM Storage APIs
Display a dialog to confirm navigation away from the current page
There\'s no console message\'s to show.
SSL error occurred while loading a resource
Clear HTTP Auth Username and Password
Private data will clear whenever you exit
Cache will clear whenever you exit
History will clear whenever you exit
Clipboard will clear whenever you exit
Remove all cookies that doesn\'t have an expiration date
Clears all storage currently being used by the JavaScript storage APIs. This includes the Application Cache, Web SQL Database and the HTML5 Web Storage APIs.
Clears any saved credentials for HTTP authentication
Enables debugging of web contents (HTML / CSS / JavaScript)
We physically can\'t. We have nowhere to store it. We don\'t even have a server database to store it. So even if Elon Musk asked nicely to see your data, we wouldn\'t have anything to show him.
We don\'t store your data period.
This URL %1$s contains Ads that was blocked by Webvium AdBlocker.
Whether the notification should be colorized
IP address above might not change while connecting to VPN.
Reduces memory footprint and increases performance
Disable WiFi after the webpage was been fully loaded
Enable WiFi before webpage get loaded

Do you really want to clear Bookmarks?
Do you really want to clear Cache?
Do you really want to clear Search History?
Do you really want to clear Preferences?
Do you really want to clear Screenshots?
Do you really want to clear Downloads?
All of Webvium Data will be deleted permanently. This includes all files, settings, databases, backups etc.

When Webvium is in list of Optimized Apps in Battery Optimization, Webvium cannot download any files in background when Battery Saver is on.

To add Webvium in Battery Optimization WhiteList click the OK button then click All Apps >> Webvium >> Don\'t Optimize >> DONE.
Storage Permission is needed to write to the SD card

Storage Permission is needed to write to the SD card
To allow click App Info >> Permission >> Storage
Storage Permission is needed to read the contents of your SD card

Storage Permission is needed to read the contents of your SD card
To allow click App Info >> Permission >>>> Storage
This certificate isn\'t from a trusted authority.
The name of the site doesn\'t match the name on the certificate.
This certificate has an invalid date.
There are problems with the security certificate for this site.
%1$s want\'s to know your device\'s location
%1$s can now access your device\'s location.

plurals.name: w1
plurals.item: It\'s time to take a break. You\'ve browsing for about %1$d minute.
It\'s time to take a break. You\'ve browsing for about %1$d minutes

resources.string: Location Permission is needed to get your precise location using the GPS and network-based

Location Permission is needed to get your precise location using the GPS and network-based
To allow click App Info >> Permission >> Location
Sets whether the Application Caches APIs should be enabled
Enabled, Including 3rd Party and File Scheme
Automatically removes the notification when it tap
Pull down to preview, click to view.
Show a notification when you copy a url
A new version of Webvium is now available to download.
Do you really want to clear Session Cookies?
Notify you that Webvium is downloading the link you requested.
Notify you that Webvium saved your phone screenshot.
Shortcut to easily access search/assist from notification.
Notify you that Webvium is downloading the link you requested and the app is in foreground.
Notify you about certain actions from Webpages.
Notify you to directly open any valid link you copied.
Notify you that there is new update in Webvium.
Immediately run gc when exiting the activity
Make Webvium Search as your default assistant
To make Webvium Search as your default Assistant in your phone, click the OK button then click Assist App >> Webvium >> DONE.
Click All Apps >> Webvium >> Don\'t Optimize >> DONE.

This will override your current Settings

Webvium will restart automatically after importing the database.

Do you really want to import History Database\nThis will override your Browsing History
Do you really want to import Bookmarks Database\nThis will override your Bookmarks

Webvium - Lightweight, Fast, Material and Full-Featured Android Web Browser.

Webvium is a weightless android app that size about 600KB.
It's Fast, Material Design and Full-Featured Web Browser for Android.
Download the latest version here: 
%1$s

Host Name: %1$s
IP Address: %2$s
Hash Code: %3$d
Canonical Hostname: %4$s
Wildcard Address: %5$b
Local Address: %6$b
Loopback Address: %7$b
Global Scope: %8$b
Link Scope: %9$b
Node Scope: %10$b
Organization Scope: %11$b
Site Scope: %12$b
IP Multicast Address: %13$b

The page you\'re trying to view contains data that has already been submitted (\"POSTDATA\"). If you resend the data, any action the form on the page carried out (such as a search or online purchase) will be repeated.
When not playing, video elements are represented by a Poster image
Custom Poster Image was been loaded.

%1$s was been flagged by Safe Browsing.

Details: %2$s
Threat: %3$s
The resource was blocked for an unknown reason.
The resource was blocked because it contains malware.
The resource was blocked because it contains deceptive content.
The resource was blocked because it contains unwanted software.
The resource was blocked because it may trick the user into a billing agreement.
There\'s no received error\'s to show
There\'s no received SSL error\'s to show
Camera Permission is needed to take videos and photos

Camera Permission is needed to take videos and photo
To allow click App Info >> Permission >> Camera
Microphone Permission is needed to record audio

Microphone Permission is needed to record audio
To allow click App Info >> Permission >> Microphone
Easily browse sites while your using other app.

Such identification enables interaction with representations of the resource over a network, typically the World Wide Web, using specific protocols. Schemes specifying a concrete syntax and associated protocols define each URI.

The scheme identifies the protocol to be used to access the resource on the Internet. It can be HTTP (without SSL) or HTTPS (with SSL).

FILE typically used to retrieve files from within one\'s own device.
The network acting poorly but will get to you ASAP.
Notify you that the webpage was been successfully loaded

Handle unhandled crash and show an error dialog instead of App has Stop Alert Dialog.
Release SQLite Database memory and call garbage collector if memory running critical, moderate or low.
Notify you that Backup Service successfully backup Webvium APK.

**Describe the bug**
Briefly explain what the bug is.

**To Reproduce**
Steps to reproduce the behavior:
1. Go to …
2. Click on …
3. Scroll down to …
4. See error

**Expected behavior**
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

**Screenshots**
If applicable, add screenshots to help explain your problem.

**Android (please complete the following information):**
- Device: [e.g. Samsung]
- OS: [e.g. Android 5]
- Webvium version: [e.g. v1.o]

**Additional context**
Add any other context about the problem here.
Click here to check it out
Notify you when Webvium finish updating.
Failed! Page not yet fully loaded.

**Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe.**
A clear and concise description of what the problem is. Ex. I'm always frustrated when […]

**Describe the solution you'd like**
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

**Describe alternatives you've considered**
A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

**Additional context**
Add any other context or screenshots about the feature request here.
Do you really want to clear Download History?
